zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir, John Andrews , I於1373年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾吉爾斯比時，他的父親Sir, Anthony Andrews , I31歲，母親Lady, Anne Thurston24歲。他於大約1403年與Joan Welles在英國諾薩普頓史爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1408年在他的家鄉享年35歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾吉爾斯比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir, John Andrews , I于1373年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾吉爾斯比时，他的父亲Sir, Anthony Andrews , I31岁，母亲Lady, Anne Thurston24岁。他于大约1403年与Joan Welles在英国諾薩普頓史爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1408年在他的家乡享年35岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾吉爾斯比。

nameMeanings.name: Andrews
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Andrew , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This is the usual southern English patronymic form, also found in Wales; the Scottish and northern English form is Anderson . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Polish Andrzejewski , Slovenian Andrejčič, Serbian and Croatian Andrić (see Andric ), and Czech Ondráček (see Ondracek ).
Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Mac Aindreis or Irish Mac Aindriú, see McAndrew .

History: This was a common name among the early settlers in New England. Robert Andrews emigrated in 1635 from Norwich, England, to Ipswich, MA. Even before 1635, one Thomas Andrews is recorded as being established in Hingham. A certain William Andrews was a member of John Davenport's company, which sailed from Boston in 1638 to found the New Haven colony.

variants.name: Andrus
meanings: History: William Andrus came to Boston in 1635 and moved to New Haven in 1639, where he died in 1676.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

variants.name: Andros
meanings: English: variant of   Andrews  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

American shortened form of Greek Andronikos (see Andron 2) or of any other surname based on a personal name beginning with Andr- (from andros, genitive of anēr ‘man, male’), e.g. Androutsos, including their patronymics and other derivatives, such as Andronikidis.

History: William Andros came to VA in 1617 and died there c. 1655. Sir Edmund Andros (1637–1714) was the British colonial governor of several provinces in America between 1674 and 1698, most notably NY (1674–81).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir, John Andrews , I was born in 1373, in Kilsby, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Sir, Anthony Andrews , I, was 31 and his mother, Lady, Anne Thurston, was 24. He married Joan Welles about 1403, in Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1408, in his hometown, at the age of 35, and was buried in Kilsby, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir, John Andrews , I est né en 1373, à Kilsby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir, Anthony Andrews , I, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady, Anne Thurston, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan Welles environ 1403, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1408, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Kilsby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir, John Andrews , I 1373 in Kilsby, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir, Anthony Andrews , I 31 und seine Mutter Lady, Anne Thurston 24. Er hat um 1403 in Northamptonshire, England Joan Welles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1408 im Alter von 35 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Kilsby, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir, John Andrews , I è nato il nel 1373 nel Kilsby, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Sir, Anthony Andrews , I, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady, Anne Thurston, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Joan Welles circa 1403, nel Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1408, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilsby, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir, John Andrews , Iが1373年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアキルスビーで生まれた時，父Sir, Anthony Andrews , Iは31歳，母Lady, Anne Thurstonは24歳であった。約1403年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでJoan Wellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1408年に故郷で35歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアキルスビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir, John Andrews , I(이)가 1373년 영국 노르섬프토실르 킬스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir, Anthony Andrews , I(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady, Anne Thurston(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1403년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 Joan Welles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1408년 그의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 킬스비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir, John Andrews , I nasceu em 1373, em Kilsby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir, Anthony Andrews , I, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady, Anne Thurston, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Welles aproximadamente 1403, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1408, em sua cidade natal, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilsby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir, John Andrews , I родился в 1373 г. в местности килсби, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir, Anthony Andrews , I было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady, Anne Thurston, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Welles около 1403 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1408 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности килсби, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir, John Andrews , I nació en 1373, en Kilsby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir, Anthony Andrews , I, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady, Anne Thurston, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Joan Welles aproximadamente 1403, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1408, en su pueblo, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Kilsby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
